subject: Possible GRB 20030109 seen by SPI ACS
body:
The ISDC shift team reports:

A possible GRB has been seen in the INTEGRAL SPI-ACS light curve on
2003-01-09  at  09:37:37  UT.
The duration of the burst is a very short at approx. 0.2 sec. No
position information is
available.
The light curve is available at:
ftp://isdcarc.unige.ch/arc/FTP/ibas/spiacs/2003-01-09T09:37:37.0000-00000-00000-0.lc
